TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Pololan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ceynsusyang ka alang Pololan. 48 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 188 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 93% niqan 175 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 7% niqan 13 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 92%, Saysiyat 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. ngayal alang Alang Furuwang(Pololan) Pgkela alang Tgkingal pnsupuwan biciq alang na Lahowser Nniqan Singcusen Cengsusyan Singrercun Kklaan ssaan Mgeriq rulu; meyah de moda mquri Singcu Newang, moda Sngtaw120 mmaha Cengsu, kleeluw naq dungal, ma bobo na mnoda hako paru Casing de, kika dehuk Furuwang. Tapa Basu; Maha tapa Basu Singcukeryun (Cutong-Pawusang), tuting Furuwang Can de dehuk di. Mggaluk na Tencutitu Tencutitu na alang Luwan na alang seediq Tayalcu Pskari Kari Tayal, Kari Telu Mpneyah na alang Qlhangan Tanax Tunux ciida de gaga meniq breenux hreyan hido ma hunac nniqan saya na Casing Swenicyaw ka Furusi,hani meyah Telu de wada uka alang nii ado mnetur palu bgihur daka quyux, wada theruy dheran breenux sipo na Singrer, Furusi kesun daha naq dungal. Patis qntaan Taiwan Yengcumingsu. Tayalcusupen.
S.PHON: = pololan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn ¶…ônsusjaŇč ka alaŇč pololan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. Ňčajal alaŇč alaŇč *u…ĺuwaŇč(pololan) pgk…ôla alaŇč tgkiŇčal pnsupuwan bi ¶iq alaŇč na lańßows…ô…ĺ nniqan siŇč ¶us…ôn ¶…ôŇčsusjan siŇč…ĺ…ô…ĺ ¶un kklaan ssaan mg…ô…ĺiq …ĺulu; m…ôańß d…ô moda mqu…ĺi siŇč ¶u n…ôwaŇč, moda sŇčtaw*** mmańßa ¶…ôŇčsu, kl…ô…ôluw naq duŇčal, ma bobo na mnoda ńßako pa…ĺu ¶asiŇč d…ô, kika d…ôńßuk *u…ĺuwaŇč. tapa basu; mańßa tapa basu siŇč ¶uk…ô…ĺjun ( ¶utoŇč-pawusaŇč), tutiŇč *u…ĺuwaŇč ¶an d…ô d…ôńßuk di. mggaluk na t…ôn ¶utitu t…ôn ¶utitu na alaŇč luwan na alaŇč s…ô…ôdiq tajal ¶u pska…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ka…ĺi t…ôlu mpn…ôańß na alaŇč qlńßaŇčan tanax tunux ¶iida d…ô gaga m…ôniq b…ĺ…ô…ônux ńß…ĺ…ôan ńßido ma ńßuna ¶ nniqan saja na ¶asiŇč sw…ôni ¶jaw ka *u…ĺusi,ńßani m…ôańß t…ôlu d…ô wada uka alaŇč nii ado mn…ôtu…ĺ palu bgińßu…ĺ daka qujux, wada tńß…ô…ĺuj dńß…ô…ĺan b…ĺ…ô…ônux sipo na siŇč…ĺ…ô…ĺ, *u…ĺusi k…ôsun dańßa naq duŇčal. patis qntaan taiwan j…ôŇč ¶umiŇčsu. tajal ¶usup…ôn.
S.FORM: = Pololan = Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ceynsusyang ka alang Pololan. 48 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 188 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 93% niqan 175 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 7% niqan 13 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 92%, Saysiyat 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. ngayal alang Alang Furuwang(Pololan) Pgkela alang Tgkingal pnsupuwan biciq alang na Lahowser Nniqan Singcusen Cengsusyan Singrercun Kklaan ssaan Mgeriq rulu; meyah de moda mquri Singcu Newang, moda Sngtaw120 mmaha Cengsu, kleeluw naq dungal, ma bobo na mnoda hako paru Casing de, kika dehuk Furuwang. Tapa Basu; Maha tapa Basu Singcukeryun (Cutong-Pawusang), tuting Furuwang Can de dehuk di. Mggaluk na Tencutitu Tencutitu na alang Luwan na alang seediq Tayalcu Pskari Kari Tayal, Kari Telu Mpneyah na alang Qlhangan Tanax Tunux ciida de gaga meniq breenux hreyan hido ma hunac nniqan saya na Casing Swenicyaw ka Furusi,hani meyah Telu de wada uka alang nii ado mnetur palu bgihur daka quyux, wada theruy dheran breenux sipo na Singrer, Furusi kesun daha naq dungal. Patis qntaan Taiwan Yengcumingsu. Tayalcusupen.
S.PHON: = pololan = gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn ¶…ônsusjaŇč ka alaŇč pololan. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal *% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, sajsijat *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. Ňčajal alaŇč alaŇč *u…ĺuwaŇč(pololan) pgk…ôla alaŇč tgkiŇčal pnsupuwan bi ¶iq alaŇč na lańßows…ô…ĺ nniqan siŇč ¶us…ôn ¶…ôŇčsusjan siŇč…ĺ…ô…ĺ ¶un kklaan ssaan mg…ô…ĺiq …ĺulu; m…ôańß d…ô moda mqu…ĺi siŇč ¶u n…ôwaŇč, moda sŇčtaw*** mmańßa ¶…ôŇčsu, kl…ô…ôluw naq duŇčal, ma bobo na mnoda ńßako pa…ĺu ¶asiŇč d…ô, kika d…ôńßuk *u…ĺuwaŇč. tapa basu; mańßa tapa basu siŇč ¶uk…ô…ĺjun ( ¶utoŇč-pawusaŇč), tutiŇč *u…ĺuwaŇč ¶an d…ô d…ôńßuk di. mggaluk na t…ôn ¶utitu t…ôn ¶utitu na alaŇč luwan na alaŇč s…ô…ôdiq tajal ¶u pska…ĺi ka…ĺi tajal, ka…ĺi t…ôlu mpn…ôańß na alaŇč qlńßaŇčan tanax tunux ¶iida d…ô gaga m…ôniq b…ĺ…ô…ônux ńß…ĺ…ôan ńßido ma ńßuna ¶ nniqan saja na ¶asiŇč sw…ôni ¶jaw ka *u…ĺusi,ńßani m…ôańß t…ôlu d…ô wada uka alaŇč nii ado mn…ôtu…ĺ palu bgińßu…ĺ daka qujux, wada tńß…ô…ĺuj dńß…ô…ĺan b…ĺ…ô…ônux sipo na siŇč…ĺ…ô…ĺ, *u…ĺusi k…ôsun dańßa naq duŇčal. patis qntaan taiwan j…ôŇč ¶umiŇčsu. tajal ¶usup…ôn.
